name: glintpost
//overrides: Force patched versions of transitive deps flagged by Dependabot (they can't be bumped via a direct dependency).
//overrides-jsdom: Pin jsdom to 27.3.0 (last release before it adopted ESM-only @exodus/bytes). isomorphic-dompurify's newer jsdom (28+/29+) require()s @exodus/bytes, which Turbopack's externalized CJS loader can't load at runtime -> ERR_REQUIRE_ESM / FUNCTION_INVOCATION_FAILED on any sanitize path (e.g. GET /api/posts/[id]). Must stay exact-pinned (^27 drifts into 27.4.0 which re-adds @exodus/bytes). Lift once html-encoding-sniffer/jsdom stop require()-ing ESM.
